lead.titleZh: 数字健康干预在老年肌少症中的应用：一项系统综述和网络Meta分析
lead.titleEn: Digital Health Interventions for Sarcopenia in Older Adults: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis
lead.paragraphZh: 今日日报共包含15个条目，涵盖6个专业方向。其中，老年康复领域的一项系统综述和网络Meta分析获得了最高分80分，该研究评估了不同模式数字健康干预对老年肌少症患者的有效性，值得临床PT重点关注。此外，神经康复领域也发表了一项关于慢性卒中患者平衡训练的RCT。
lead.paragraphEn: Today's daily report features 15 entries across 6 specialties. A systematic review and network meta-analysis in geriatric rehabilitation received the highest score of 80, examining the effectiveness of various digital health interventions for sarcopenia in older adults, warranting particular attention from clinicians. Additionally, a randomized controlled trial on balance training for chronic stroke patients was published in neurorehabilitation.

items.title: The Semmelweis Framework: structuring evidence foundations and expert opinion in clinical practice guidelines | BMC Medical Research Methodology
items.summary: The Semmelweis Framework was developed as a methodological tool to structure expert opinion in clinical practice guidelines, particularly when evidence is scarce.
items.curatedReason: Semmelweis框架为临床实践指南中专家意见的结构化提供了新思路。在证据稀缺的情况下，采用标准化的方法整合专家意见，能提升指南的质量和可靠性。
items.titleZh: Semmelweis框架：临床实践指南中证据基础和专家意见的结构化方法
items.summaryZh: Semmelweis框架旨在作为一种方法学工具，用于在临床实践指南中，尤其是在证据稀缺时，结构化专家意见。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Semmelweis Framework offers a new approach to structuring expert opinion in clinical practice guidelines. Standardizing the integration of expert opinion, especially when evidence is scarce, can enhance guideline quality and reliability.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于框架的开发，并非针对特定临床指南的验证研究。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on framework development, not validation for specific clinical guidelines.

items.title: Long-term clinical outcomes and complications after Open Reduction and Internal Fixation (ORIF) with locking plate for proximal humerus fractures: a systematic review and meta-analysis | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the long-term clinical outcomes and complications after open reduction and internal fixation (ORIF) with locking plate for proximal humerus fractures.
items.curatedReason: 锁定钢板内固定治疗肱骨近端骨折的长期疗效和并发症已被系统性总结。这份综述是评估这种手术方案预后的良好参考，尤其是在与康复策略结合时。
items.titleZh: 锁定钢板切开复位内固定术治疗肱骨近端骨折的长期临床结果和并发症：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析探讨了锁定钢板切开复位内固定术治疗肱骨近端骨折的长期临床结果和并发症。
items.curatedReasonEn: Long-term clinical outcomes and complications of locking plate open reduction and internal fixation for proximal humerus fractures have been systematically summarized. This review serves as a good reference for evaluating the prognosis of this surgical option, especially when combined with rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 系统综述和荟萃分析可能受到纳入研究异质性的影响。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews and meta-analyses can be affected by the heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: Advancing spine connectomics and neural integration through machine learning and neuroengineering: a narrative review.
items.summary: A narrative review summarizes recent advances in spinal circuitry, emphasizing machine learning and neuroengineering, suggesting the spinal cord is an active system contributing to sensorimotor integration and adaptive motor control.
items.curatedReason: 我们是时候更新对脊髓的认知了：它绝不仅仅是反射弧的传导通路，而是一个主动参与感觉运动整合和适应性运动控制的复杂系统。未来脊髓损伤的康复干预，很可能会从靶向特定神经回路入手。
items.titleZh: 机器学习和神经工程推动脊柱连接组学和神经整合研究进展：叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述总结了脊髓回路研究的最新进展，重点介绍了机器学习和神经工程的应用，表明脊髓是一个积极参与感觉运动整合和适应性运动控制的系统。
items.curatedReasonEn: It's time to update our understanding of the spinal cord: it's far more than just a reflex arc conduit, actively engaging in sensorimotor integration and adaptive motor control. Future neurorehabilitation for spinal cord injuries will likely target specific neural circuits.
items.limitation: 这是一篇叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未进行系统性证据评估。
items.limitationEn: As a narrative review, it may be subject to selection bias and does not involve systematic evidence appraisal.
items.journal: European spine journal : official publication of the European Spine Society, the European Spinal Deformity Society, and the European Section of the Cervical Spine Research Society

items.title: Effects of multimodal balance training with and without auditory cues on balance, gait mobility, risk of fall and quality of life in patients with chronic stroke
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 42 chronic stroke survivors found that multimodal balance training combined with auditory cues may improve balance, gait mobility, fall risk, and quality of life more effectively than the same training without auditory cues.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性卒中患者，多模式平衡训练结合听觉提示可能在改善平衡、步态移动、降低跌倒风险和生活质量方面比单纯训练更有效。这个小样本 RCT 提示了多感官整合在神经康复中的潜力，值得你在设计个性化训练方案时考虑。
items.titleZh: 多模式平衡训练结合/不结合听觉提示对慢性卒中患者平衡、步态移动、跌倒风险和生活质量的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 42 名慢性卒中幸存者的随机对照试验发现，结合听觉提示的多模式平衡训练在改善平衡、步态移动、跌倒风险和生活质量方面可能比不结合听觉提示的训练更有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic stroke patients, multimodal balance training with auditory cues may be more effective than training alone in improving balance, gait mobility, fall risk, and quality of life. This small-sample RCT suggests the potential of multisensory integration in neurorehabilitation, worth considering when designing personalized training programs.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（42 名参与者），且为单中心研究，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (42 participants) and is single-center, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Factors Explaining Limited Daily Hand-use in Individuals with Fair-Good Motor Ability Post-Stroke.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study identified factors explaining limited daily hand-use in individuals post-stroke with fair-to-good motor ability, including proprioception, executive functions, and self-efficacy, beyond motor impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究提示，即便卒中患者上肢运动能力良好，其日常手部使用受限的原因可能超出运动障碍本身。它指出了本体感觉、执行功能和自我效能等因素的重要性，这有助于你进行更全面的评估和干预。
items.titleZh: 解释卒中后运动能力良好个体日常手部使用受限的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究发现，即使卒中后个体上肢运动能力良好，其日常手部使用受限的解释因素可能超出运动障碍，包括本体感觉、执行功能和自我效能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that even in stroke patients with fair-to-good upper extremity motor ability, limited daily hand use may stem from factors beyond motor impairment. It highlights the importance of proprioception, executive functions, and self-efficacy, which can aid in your comprehensive assessment and intervention planning.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在自我报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality and may be subject to self-report bias.

items.title: Lifestyle medicine innovations: Physical activity assessment in patient care and implementation of a digital health platform to support healthier movement.
items.summary: A narrative review introduces the ExerciseRxTM digital health platform as a scalable approach for personalized physical activity and home exercise support in clinical care, integrating physical activity vital signs.
items.curatedReason: ExerciseRxTM 平台提供了一个可参考的范例，说明如何将患者的身体活动视为“生命体征”之一，并将其整合到日常临床护理中。如果你正在探索数字化工具来优化患者居家锻炼和生活方式干预，可以关注其设计理念。
items.titleZh: 生活方式医学创新：患者护理中的身体活动评估及数字健康平台实施以支持更健康的运动
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述介绍了 ExerciseRxTM 数字健康平台，作为一种可扩展的方法，用于在临床护理中支持个性化身体活动和家庭锻炼，并整合了身体活动生命体征。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ExerciseRxTM platform offers a blueprint for treating physical activity as a 'vital sign' and integrating it into routine clinical care. If you're exploring digital tools to optimize patient home exercise and lifestyle interventions, pay attention to its design philosophy.
items.limitation: 这是一篇叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且对平台效果的报告处于早期研究阶段。
items.limitationEn: As a narrative review, it may be subject to selection bias, and the reported platform effects are in early research stages.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Survey of underlying risk factors and epidemiology of anterior knee pain in semi-professional male basketball players | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A survey investigated the underlying risk factors and epidemiology of anterior knee pain in semi-professional male basketball players.
items.curatedReason: 半职业男篮运动员的前膝痛风险因素调查表明，识别特定风险点至关重要。你需要根据这些流行病学数据，更精准地筛选高危运动员，并在训练中实施针对性预防策略。
items.titleZh: 半职业男子篮球运动员前膝痛潜在风险因素和流行病学调查
items.summaryZh: 一项调查研究了半职业男子篮球运动员前膝痛的潜在风险因素和流行病学。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey on anterior knee pain risk factors in semi-professional male basketball players highlights the importance of identifying specific risk points. You should use these epidemiological data to more precisely screen high-risk athletes and implement targeted prevention strategies in training.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study and cannot establish causality.

items.title: Diagnosis, prevention and treatment of common shoulder ...
items.summary: A statement paper commissioned by the Danish Society of Sports Physical Therapy provides graded evidence for the diagnosis, prevention, and treatment of common shoulder injuries in sport.
items.curatedReason: 丹麦运动物理治疗学会的肩关节运动损伤诊疗指南，为你提供了基于证据的诊断、预防和治疗策略。这是你临床实践中处理肩关节运动损伤的权威参考。
items.titleZh: 运动中常见肩关节损伤的诊断、预防和治疗：丹麦运动物理治疗学会委托声明书的证据分级
items.summaryZh: 丹麦运动物理治疗学会委托声明书提供了运动中常见肩关节损伤的诊断、预防和治疗的证据分级。
items.curatedReasonEn: This statement from the Danish Society of Sports Physical Therapy offers graded evidence for the diagnosis, prevention, and treatment of common shoulder injuries in sport. It serves as a valuable clinical reference to guide your management of these injuries.
items.limitation: 本指南发表于2023年，部分证据可能需要随时间推移进行更新。
items.limitationEn: This guideline was published in 2023, and some evidence may need updating over time.

items.title: Effectiveness of different modes of digital health interventions for sarcopenia in older adults: a systematic review and network meta-analysis | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of different modes of digital health interventions for sarcopenia in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 数字健康干预对老年肌少症患者的有效性，这项系统综述和网络Meta分析为你提供了不同模式的相对疗效证据。你可以根据这些发现，选择最适合患者的数字化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 不同模式数字健康干预对老年肌少症患者的有效性：一项系统综述和网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络Meta分析评估了不同模式数字健康干预对老年肌少症患者的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This high-quality systematic review and network meta-analysis clarifies the effectiveness of various digital health intervention modes for sarcopenia in older adults. When designing digital rehabilitation programs for your patients, select the most suitable mode based on this evidence.
items.limitation: 网络Meta分析的比较结果受限于不同数字干预模式之间的研究数量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: The comparative results of network meta-analysis are limited by the number and heterogeneity of studies across different digital intervention modes.

items.title: Healthcare professionals’ perspectives on implementing the H.O.M.E mobility intervention in acute care: a mixed-methods study | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A mixed-methods study explored healthcare professionals’ experiences and perceptions of implementing the H.O.M.E mobility intervention in acute care settings for older adults.
items.curatedReason: 医护人员对H.O.M.E移动干预的反馈，揭示了在急性护理环境中推行老年患者早期移动方案的实际挑战和可行性。这些见解对于你规划和落地老年患者的早期康复项目至关重要。
items.titleZh: 医护人员对急症护理中实施H.O.M.E移动干预的看法：一项混合方法研究
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法研究探讨了医护人员对在急症护理环境中实施H.O.M.E移动干预措施的经验和看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: Healthcare professionals' feedback on the H.O.M.E mobility intervention highlights the practical challenges and feasibility of implementing early mobility programs for older adults in acute care settings. These insights are crucial for you when planning and deploying early rehabilitation programs for elderly patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项混合方法研究，主要关注医护人员的视角，而非干预本身的临床效果评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a mixed-methods study focusing on healthcare professionals' perspectives, not an evaluation of the intervention's clinical effectiveness.

items.title: A nurse-led peer support program to address frailty in nursing homes: preliminary outcomes from a pilot pre-post study | BMC Public Health
items.summary: A pilot pre-post study evaluated the preliminary outcomes of a nurse-led peer support program incorporating structured motor-cognitive activities for frail nursing home residents.
items.curatedReason: 护士主导的同伴支持项目，通过运动认知活动改善养老院衰弱老人的状况，初步结果显示出积极潜力。这提示你可以探索多学科团队合作，将此类支持融入老年康复。
items.titleZh: 一项护士主导的同伴支持项目应对养老院衰弱老人的初步结果：一项试点前瞻性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项试点前瞻性研究评估了护士主导的同伴支持项目对养老院衰弱老人状况的初步改善结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Preliminary outcomes from a nurse-led peer support program, incorporating structured motor-cognitive activities to address frailty in nursing home residents, show positive potential. This suggests you can explore interdisciplinary collaboration to integrate such support into geriatric rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为试点性的前瞻性研究，样本量小，且为单中心研究。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot pre-post study with a small sample size and is a single-center study.

items.title: Frailty, physiological reserve, and surgical resilience: toward a dynamic stress–recovery model | Aging Clinical and Experimental Research
items.summary: A review proposes a dynamic stress–recovery model linking frailty, physiological reserve, and surgical resilience to improve perioperative decision-making.
items.curatedReason: 衰弱、生理储备和手术复原力之间的动态应激-恢复模型，为老年患者围手术期评估提供了新视角。理解这些概念，能帮助你更精准地评估高龄患者的康复潜力。
items.titleZh: 衰弱、生理储备和手术复原力：迈向动态应激-恢复模型
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述提出了一个连接衰弱、生理储备和手术复原力的动态应激-恢复模型，旨在改善围手术期决策。
items.curatedReasonEn: The dynamic stress-recovery model linking frailty, physiological reserve, and surgical resilience offers a new framework for assessing perioperative risk and rehabilitation potential in older patients. Integrating these concepts into your assessments will help you manage elderly patients more precisely.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要为概念性模型，缺乏原始数据支持。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, primarily a conceptual model, lacking support from original data.

items.title: Characterization of orthogeriatric care models and association with mortality and health-economic outcomes in patients with hip fractures: a retrospective cohort study from Germany | BMC Geriatrics
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study from Germany characterized orthogeriatric care models and examined their association with mortality and health-economic outcomes in patients with hip fractures.
items.curatedReason: 德国骨科老年护理模型的分析显示，不同护理模式与髋部骨折患者的死亡率和经济结局存在关联。这提示我们，优化护理路径对改善老年髋部骨折患者的预后至关重要。
items.titleZh: 德国骨科老年护理模式的特征及其与髋部骨折患者死亡率和健康经济结局的关联：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项德国的回顾性队列研究描述了骨科老年护理模式的特征，并分析了它们与髋部骨折患者死亡率和健康经济结局的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis of orthogeriatric care models in Germany shows an association between different models and mortality and health-economic outcomes in hip fracture patients. This suggests that optimizing care pathways is crucial for improving prognoses in elderly hip fracture patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which may have confounding factors and selection bias.

items.title: Integrated cardiopulmonary rehabilitation nursing workforce development: an integrative literature review | BMC Nursing
items.summary: An integrative literature review examined the integrated cardiopulmonary rehabilitation nursing workforce development, focusing on educational pathways, competency expectations, and implementation conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项关于综合心肺康复护理劳动力发展的文献综述，揭示了当前教育路径、能力期望和实施条件存在的差距。作为物理治疗师，这提醒你关注跨专业协作，推动心肺康复团队的专业化发展。
items.titleZh: 综合心肺康复护理劳动力发展：一项综合性文献综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇综合性文献综述探讨了综合心肺康复护理劳动力的发展，重点关注教育途径、能力期望和实施条件。
items.curatedReasonEn: This integrative literature review on integrated cardiopulmonary rehabilitation nursing workforce development highlights gaps in current educational pathways, competency expectations, and implementation conditions. As a physical therapist, this reminds you to focus on interprofessional collaboration and promote the professional development of cardiopulmonary rehabilitation teams.
items.limitation: 本综述侧重于护理劳动力，物理治疗师的角色和发展未被详细探讨。
items.limitationEn: This review focuses on the nursing workforce; the role and development of physical therapists are not detailed.

items.title: O’Halloran Rehabilitation Monetizes Complex Care and Protects Revenue with WebPT SOAP 2.0
items.summary: O'Halloran Rehabilitation successfully leveraged WebPT SOAP 2.0 to manage complex care and protect revenue, demonstrating the benefits of specialized EMR systems for physical therapy practices.
items.curatedReason: 了解物理治疗 EMR 系统的市场应用案例，对你评估是否引入或优化现有系统有帮助。
items.titleZh: O’Halloran Rehabilitation 利用 WebPT SOAP 2.0 实现复杂护理变现并保护收入
items.summaryZh: O’Halloran Rehabilitation 成功利用 WebPT SOAP 2.0 系统管理复杂护理并保护收入，展示了专业 EMR 系统对物理治疗实践的益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding market use cases for physical therapy EMR systems can help you evaluate whether to adopt or optimize your current system.
